revision.comment: Bot: mark 2 deleted QID(s) as DELETED_QID in ill templates [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24432061637|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:ぎふ七福神]]
'''Gifu Shichifukujin''' (ぎふ七福神, "Gifu Seven Lucky Gods") is a pilgrimage route of '''Seven Lucky Gods''' (*Shichifukujin*) located in the northeastern part of [[:en:Gifu City|Gifu City]], extending into the northwestern part of [[Kakamigahara City]], {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|qid=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}}. The route consists of '''Sōtō Zen Buddhist temples''' and was '''established in 2012'''.
== List of Gifu Shichifukujin Temples == The pilgrimage course consists of six temples, as '''Fukurokuju''' and '''Jurōjin''' are enshrined together at the same temple.
* '''{{ill|Daikokuten|en|Daikokuten|qid=Q1759916|lt=Daikokuten|1=Daikokuten}}''': {{ill|Zuigan-ji (Kakamigahara)|ja|瑞巌寺 (各務原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zuigan-ji (Kakamigahara)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 瑞巖寺 (各務原市)|1=Zuigan-ji Temple (Kakamigahara)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q110555161}} – '''Kita-hora, Kakamigahara City''' * '''{{ill|Ebisu (mythology)|ja|恵比寿|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ebisu (mythology)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to えびす (曖昧さ回避)|1=Ebisu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q255907}}''': {{ill|Chishō-in (Gifu)|ja|智照院 (岐阜市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Chishō-in (Gifu)|1=Chishō-in Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q106836887}} – '''Iwata Nishi, Gifu City''' * '''{{ill|Budai|en|Budai|qid=Q599838|lt=Hotei|1=Budai}}''': {{ill|Rinyō-ji|ja|林陽寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rinyō-ji|1=Rin'yō-ji Temple|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q106577615}} – '''Iwata Nishi, Gifu City''' * '''{{ill|Vaiśravaṇa|en|Vaiśravaṇa|qid=Q866315|lt=Bishamonten|1=Vaiśravaṇa}}''': {{ill|Ryūun-ji (Gifu)|ja|龍雲寺 (岐阜市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ryūun-ji (Gifu)|1=Ryūun-ji Temple (Gifu)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q106836885}} – '''Akutami Ōfunamachi, Gifu City''' * '''{{ill|Benzaiten|ja|弁財天|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Benzaiten|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 弁才天}}''': {{ill|Kisshō-ji (Gifu)|ja|吉祥寺 (岐阜市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kisshō-ji (Gifu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135504271}} – '''Tarōmaru, Gifu City''' * '''{{ill|Jurōjin|en|Jurōjin|qid=Q389611|lt=Jurōjin|1=Jurōjin}} & {{ill|Fukurokuju|en|Fukurokuju|qid=Q780797|lt=Fukurokuju|1=Fukurokuju}}''': {{ill|Daikaku-ji (Gifu)|ja|大覚寺 (岐阜市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Daikaku-ji (Gifu)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=DELETED_QID|1=Q135504275}} – '''Nagara, Gifu City'''
== External Links == - [Official Website](https://gifu7fukujin.com/)
== See Also == - {{ill|Mino 33 Kannon Pilgrimage|ja|美濃三十三観音|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mino 33 Kannon Pilgrimage|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 美濃三十三観音霊場|1=Mino Thirty-three Kannon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3538488}} - {{ill|Mino Seven Lucky Gods|ja|美濃七福神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mino Seven Lucky Gods|1=Mino Seven Lucky Gods|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11609197}} - {{ill|Mino Shikoku Pilgrimage|ja|美濃四国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mino Shikoku Pilgrimage|1=Minoshikoku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11609220}} - {{ill|Pilgrimage|en|Pilgrimage|qid=Q1644573|lt=Pilgrimage|1=Pilgrimage}} - [[List of Buddhist Temples in Japan]]
{{translated page|ja|ぎふ七福神|version=102232921|comment=Imported full ja history}}
